44.reason: [Accessing st[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior); also, loop runs far beyond string length causing unnecessary checks and potential access beyond null terminator]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior); also, loop runs far beyond string length causing unnecessary checks and potential access beyond null terminator]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior); also, loop runs to 1000000 regardless of actual string length, causing unnecessary output of null bytes and potential access beyond input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior); also, loop runs fixed 1000000 times instead of until end of string, causing unnecessary output of null bytes and potential access beyond input length]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] and st[i+1] when i=0 or near the end of the string leads to out-of-bounds memory access, which is undefined behavior. Also, the loop runs up to 1000000 regardless of actual string length, causing unnecessary iterations and potential access beyond null terminator.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing st[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior). Also, the loop runs up to 1000000 regardless of actual string length, causing unnecessary output of null bytes and potential access beyond input. Additionally, after processing a '-', the next character (st[i+1]) is printed again in the next iteration, leading to duplication.]
